$schema_note: Policy registry for --auto goal selection (hub #53/#71, supersedes design #18 O2). Maps goal slug -> hub goal issue + policy binding. Direction and membership live in the hub goal issue (anchors/backlog YAML block + sub-issue links); this file holds only what selection policy needs. Inside the policy-file carve-out: PRs touching it are never merged unattended, and only @jwildfire-approved changes land. Adding a goal here is what makes it selectable by --auto.
